title: Christmas Santa Claus Sacks. 19.7''x28.3'' (50X72cm) Large Christmas Santa Sacks Ho Ho Ho. Pack of 2.
features: PACK OF 2. The package includes two 19.7''x28.3'' large Santa sacks with drawstrings. Large Santa sack with Santa Claus’ face and classic “Ho Ho Ho” saying.
TOP QUALITY — The bags are made from high-quality polyester, which has excellent durability and breathability making it a great alternative to single-use wrapping paper and plastic bags.

LARGE SIZE： Each sack measures 19.7''x28.3'' (50X72cm). Enough space to hold a variety of gifts such as Clothing, Books, Electronics, or other oversized items. Fill them with candy and gifts to make your present stand out from others under the Christmas tree.
3D EMBROIDERED DESIGN: Beautifully designed to depict Santa Claus’ jolly face and signature saying that all kids know and love.
REUSABLE – Unlike wrapping paper, our Christmas sacks are reusable and durable for long-lasting use. You can use them after the Christmas season.
description: Product Description Make your Christmas morning magical with a set of two generously-sized Santa sacks.
